items.title: H.C. Wainwright Raises Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. (PTGX) Target to $117, Reiterates Buy
items.description: We recently published an article titled 10 Best Long Term Healthcare Stocks to Buy. On January 30, H.C. Wainwright raised its price target on Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PTGX) to $117 from $80 and reiterated a Buy rating. The firm cited the company’s track record in drug development and assigned probability-of-success assumptions across multiple programs, including […]

items.title: Johnson & Johnson Files For Debt Shelf, Size Not Disclosed
Should You Buy ISRG Stock Despite a 13% Fall in Three Months?
items.description: ISRG has lost 13% in three months, but strong da Vinci 5 adoption and rising procedures raise a bigger question: is this pullback a buying opportunity?

items.title: NIH Stops Johnson & Johnson's Blood Thinner Drug Arm In Stroke Trial After Safety Review
items.description: NIH stops rivaroxaban arm in CAPTIVA stroke trial after safety events and futility signal; study continues with other treatment groups.

items.title: VYM’s S&P Beating Dividend Survived Two Decades Without Missing a Payment
items.description: Vanguard High Dividend Yield Index Fund ETF Shares (NYSEARCA:VYM) generates income by holding a diversified portfolio of dividend-paying U.S. stocks and passing those dividends directly to shareholders. With $88.5 billion in assets and an ultra-low 0.06% expense ratio, VYM offers cost-efficient exposure to companies that consistently return cash to investors. The fund currently yields 2.45%, ... VYM’s S&P Beating Dividend Survived Two Decades Without Missing a Payment
